tasks.title: Update _transcribe_bytes in transcribe_client/openrouter.py: increase max_retries to 5, add 429 to retryable status codes, use capped exponential backoff (2s,4s,8s,16s,30s), log retry attempts with ISO timestamps
tasks.description: Single function edit: the retry loop at line 106-147 currently does 3 retries with 2^n backoff and only retries 502/503/504 on status check. Add 429 to the status-code retry branch, increase max_retries to 5, cap backoff at 30s, and add datetime.utcnow().isoformat() to each retry log line.

tasks.title: Add 429 chunk throttle in transcribe method of transcribe_client/openrouter.py: when a chunk transcription returns 429 error, pause (sleep 30s) before attempting the next chunk to avoid parallel hammering
tasks.description: Single method edit: in the chunk loop (line 223-239), after _transcribe_bytes returns status==error, check if meta.error contains '429' and if so sleep before continuing to next chunk. This prevents sending parallel chunk-requests while rate-limited.

tasks.title: Add adapter fallback in TranscribeClient.transcribe in transcribe_client/__init__.py: if primary adapter raises TranscriptionError or returns status==error, try DeepInfraAdapter as fallback before surfacing the error
tasks.description: Single method edit: wrap the existing self._adapter.transcribe call in a try/except. On failure, if DeepInfraAdapter is available and DEEPINFRA_API_KEY is set and current adapter is not already DeepInfra, instantiate DeepInfraAdapter and retry. Log the fallback attempt. Return the fallback result or raise original error if fallback also fails.

tasks.title: Change job_worker.py _handle_failure to store clean error message (str(exc)[:4000]) in job.error instead of full traceback; traceback stays in logger.exception log only
tasks.description: Single method edit: in JobWorker._handle_failure (line 212-214), replace error_message = ''.join(traceback.format_exception(...)) with error_message = str(exc)[:4000]. The full traceback is already logged by logger.exception on line 215-218. This prevents raw tracebacks from being stored in the DB and leaked to users.

tasks.title: Add _user_facing_error helper in transkribator_modules/bot/utils.py that converts any raw error string into a friendly user message: 'Произошла ошибка при обработке. Попробуйте позже или обратитесь в поддержку.'
tasks.description: One new function in an existing utils module. The helper takes an optional raw error string and returns a fixed friendly Russian message. This is the shared sanitization point for all user-facing error display paths.

tasks.title: Fix max_bot/native_service.py _poll_completed_jobs: replace raw job.error in send_message with _user_facing_error helper to hide tracebacks from MAX users
tasks.description: Single function edit: line 61-63 currently sends f'❌ Ошибка обработки:\n{error_text}' with raw job.error. Import and use _user_facing_error to send a friendly message instead. The raw error stays in logs.

tasks.title: Fix max_bot/native_handlers.py _poll_max_job_progress: replace raw row.get('error') in edit_message with _user_facing_error helper to hide tracebacks from MAX users
tasks.description: Single line edit: line 203 sends f"❌ Ошибка обработки: {row.get('error') or 'Неизвестная ошибка'}". Replace with _user_facing_error(row.get('error')) to show a friendly message.

tasks.title: Sanitize job.error in core_api/api/v1/internal_bot.py get_job_row endpoint: return a boolean has_error instead of raw error string, or return sanitized message
tasks.description: Single endpoint edit: line 61 returns 'error': job.error raw. Replace with a sanitized field: return 'error': bool(job.error) and 'error_message': _user_facing_error(job.error) so API consumers cannot leak raw tracebacks. Import the helper from bot.utils.

tasks.title: Sanitize job.error in core_api/domains/ingestion/media_service.py get_job_status: replace raw job.error in JobStatus with sanitized message
tasks.description: Single line edit: line 104 sets error=job.error. Replace with error=_user_facing_error(job.error) so the JobStatus dataclass carries a sanitized message. Import the helper.

tasks.title: Add async error_handler function in transkribator_modules/bot/error_handler.py that logs the error, checks for None update/effective_user, and optionally notifies the user with a friendly message
tasks.description: One new file with a single async function error_handler(update, context). It should: 1) log the exception via logger.exception, 2) guard against update being None or update.effective_user being None (the AttributeError root cause), 3) if update and update.effective_chat exist, try to send a friendly error message to the chat.

tasks.title: Register the global error handler in transkribator_modules/main.py: call application.add_error_handler(error_handler) before run_polling
tasks.description: Single wiring edit: import error_handler from transkribator_modules.bot.error_handler and add application.add_error_handler(error_handler) after all handlers are registered (after line 164, before run_polling on line 168).

tasks.title: Guard handle_message in transkribator_modules/bot/handlers.py against None update.from_user / update.effective_user: add early return with debug log if user cannot be determined
tasks.description: Single function edit: at the top of handle_message (line 1720), after getting update.message, add a guard: if update.effective_user is None, log a debug warning and return early. This prevents the AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'from_user' at the source.

tasks.title: Add test in tests/test_openrouter_client.py: mock requests.post to return 429 twice then 200, assert _transcribe_bytes retries and succeeds, verify backoff sleep calls and timestamp logging
tasks.description: Append one test function to the existing test file. Use monkeypatch to mock requests.post and time.sleep. Assert the adapter retries on 429 and eventually succeeds. Verify sleep was called with expected backoff values.

tasks.title: Add test in tests/test_transcribe_client.py: inject a stub adapter that raises TranscriptionError, mock DeepInfraAdapter to return success, assert TranscribeClient falls back to DeepInfra
tasks.description: Append one test function to the existing test file. Create a FailingAdapter that raises on transcribe, monkeypatch DeepInfraAdapter with a StubAdapter-like mock, and verify TranscribeClient.transcribe returns the fallback result.

tasks.title: Add test in tests/ for _user_facing_error helper: assert raw traceback input produces friendly message, None input produces friendly message, short error produces friendly message
tasks.description: One new test file or append to existing utils test. Test that the helper always returns the fixed friendly message regardless of input, never echoes the raw error.
